sentence: "We now have 4-month-old mice that are non-diabetic that used to be diabetic," he added.
sentence_translated: Teraz máme 4-mesačné myši, ktoré sú nediabetické, ktoré predtým boli diabetické," dodal.

sentence: Dr. Ehud Ur, professor of medicine at Dalhousie University in Halifax, Nova Scotia and chair of the clinical and scientific division of the Canadian Diabetes Association cautioned that the research is still in its early days.
sentence_translated: Dr. Ehud Ur, profesor medicíny na Dalhousie University v Halifaxe, Nové Škótsko a predseda klinickej a vedeckej divízie Kanadskej diabetologickej asociácie varoval, že výskum je stále v počiatočnej fáze.

sentence: Like some other experts, he is skeptical about whether diabetes can be cured, noting that these findings have no relevance to people who already have Type 1 diabetes.
sentence_translated: Rovnako ako niektorí iní odborníci, je skeptický voči tomu, či je možné vyliečiť cukrovku, pričom poznamenáva, že tieto zistenia nemajú žiadny význam pre ľudí, ktorí už majú cukrovku typu 1.

sentence: On Monday, Sara Danius, permanent secretary of the Nobel Committee for Literature at the Swedish Academy, publicly announced during a radio program on Sveriges Radio in Sweden the committee, unable to reach Bob Dylan directly about winning the 2016 Nobel Prize in Literature, had abandoned its efforts to reach him.
sentence_translated: V pondelok, Sara Danius, trvalá tajomníčka Nobelovej komisie pre literatúru pri Švédskej akadémii, verejne oznámila počas rozhlasového programu na Sveriges Radio v Švédsku, že komisia, ktorá sa nedokázala priamo skontaktovať s Bobom Dylanom ohľadom získania Nobelovej ceny za literatúru v roku 2016, ukončila svoje snahy skontaktovať sa s ním.

sentence: Danius said, "Right now we are doing nothing. I have called and sent emails to his closest collaborator and received very friendly replies. For now, that is certainly enough."
sentence_translated: Danius povedal: "Práve teraz nerobíme nič. Zavolal som a poslal e-maily jeho najbližšiemu spolupracovníkovi a dostal som veľmi priateľské odpovede. To je určite dosť na teraz."

sentence: Previously, Ring's CEO, Jamie Siminoff, remarked the company started when his doorbell wasn't audible from his shop in his garage.
sentence_translated: Predtým generálny riaditeľ spoločnosti Ring, Jamie Siminoff, poznamenal, že spoločnosť vznikla, keď jeho zvonček nebolo počuť z jeho obchodu v garáži.

sentence: He built a WiFi door bell, he said.
sentence_translated: Postavil WiFi zvonček, povedal.

sentence: Siminoff said sales boosted after his 2013 appearance in a Shark Tank episode where the show panel declined funding the startup.
sentence_translated: Siminoff povedal, že predaje vzrástli po jeho vystúpení v epizóde Shark Tank v roku 2013, kde panel relácie odmietol financovanie startupu.

sentence: In late 2017, Siminoff appeared on shopping television channel QVC.
sentence_translated: Koncom roku 2017 sa Siminoff objavil na nákupnom televíznom kanáli QVC.

sentence: Ring also settled a lawsuit with competing security company, the ADT Corporation.

sentence: While one experimental vaccine appears able to reduce Ebola mortality, up until now, no drugs have been clearly demonstrated suitable for treating existing infection.
sentence_translated: Zatiaľ čo sa zdá, že jedna experimentálna vakcína dokáže znížiť úmrtnosť na Ebolu, doteraz neboli žiadne lieky jasne preukázané ako vhodné na liečbu existujúcej infekcie.

sentence: One antibody cocktail, ZMapp, initially showed promise in the field, but formal studies indicated it had less benefit than sought in preventing death.
sentence_translated: Jeden protilátkový koktail, ZMapp, spočiatku vykazoval sľub v tejto oblasti, ale formálne štúdie naznačili, že mal menší prínos, než sa očakávalo, pri prevencii úmrtí.

sentence: In the PALM trial, ZMapp served as a control, meaning scientists used it as a baseline and compared the three other treatments to it.
sentence_translated: V štúdii PALM slúžil ZMapp ako kontrola, čo znamená, že vedci ho použili ako základ a porovnávali s ním tri ďalšie liečby.

sentence: USA Gymnastics supports the United States Olympic Committee's letter and accepts the absolute need of the Olympic family to promote a safe environment for all of our athletes.

sentence: We agree with the USOC's statement that the interests of our athletes and clubs, and their sport, may be better served by moving forward with meaningful change within our organization, rather than decertification.
sentence_translated: Súhlasíme s vyhlásením USOC, že záujmy našich športovcov a klubov, ako aj ich športu, môžu byť lepšie zabezpečené pokrokom k významným zmenám v našej organizácii, než decertifikáciou.

sentence: USA Gymnastics supports an independent investigation that may shine light on how abuse of the proportion described so courageously by the survivors of Larry Nassar could have gone undetected for so long and embraces any necessary and appropriate changes.

sentence: USA Gymnastics and the USOC have the same goal — making the sport of gymnastics, and others, as safe as possible for athletes to follow their dreams in a safe, positive and empowered environment.
sentence_translated: USA Gymnastika a USOC majú rovnaký cieľ — urobiť gymnastiku a iné športy čo najbezpečnejšie pre športovcov, aby mohli sledovať svoje sny v bezpečnom, pozitívnom a posilňujúcom prostredí.

sentence: Throughout 1960s, Brzezinski worked for John F. Kennedy as his advisor and then the Lyndon B. Johnson administration.

sentence: During the 1976 selections he advised Carter on foreign policy, then served as National Security Advisor (NSA) from 1977 to 1981, succeeding Henry Kissinger.
sentence_translated: Počas výberov v roku 1976 radil Carterovi v oblasti zahraničnej politiky, potom slúžil ako národný bezpečnostný poradca (NSA) od roku 1977 do 1981,kým nahradil Henryho Kissingera.

sentence: As NSA, he assisted Carter in diplomatically handling world affairs, such as the Camp David Accords, 1978; normalizing US–China relations thought the late 1970s; the Iranian Revolution, which led to the Iran hostage crisis, 1979; and the Soviet invasion in Afghanistan, 1979.

sentence: The movie, featuring Ryan Gosling and Emma Stone, received nominations in all major categories.

sentence: Late on Sunday, the United States President Donald Trump, in a statement delivered via the press secretary, announced US troops would be leaving Syria.
sentence_translated: Neskoro v nedeľu večer prezident Spojených štátov Donald Trump vo vyhlásení, ktoré predniesol prostredníctvom tlačového tajomníka, oznámil, že americké jednotky opustia Sýriu.

sentence: This not only confirms that at least some dinosaurs had feathers, a theory already widespread, but provides details fossils generally cannot, such as color and three-dimensional arrangement.
sentence_translated: Toto nielen potvrdzuje, že aspoň niektoré dinosaury mali perie, čo je už rozšírená teória, ale poskytuje aj podrobnosti, ktoré fosílie zvyčajne nemôžu, ako je farba a trojrozmerné usporiadanie.

sentence: . Scientists say this animal's plumage was chestnut-brown on top with a pale or carotenoid-colored underside.
sentence_translated: Vedci tvrdia, že perie tohto zvieraťa bolo na vrchu gaštanovo-hnedé s bledým alebo karotenoidovým spodkom.

sentence: The find also grants insight into the evolution of feathers in birds.
sentence_translated: Nález tiež poskytuje pohľad na evolúciu peria u vtákov.

sentence: Because the dinosaur feathers do not have a well-developed shaft, called a rachis, but do have other features of feathers — barbs and barbules — the researchers inferred the rachis was likely a later evolutionary development that these other features.
sentence_translated: Pretože perie dinosaurov nemá dobre vyvinutú stopku, nazývanú rachis, ale má iné znaky peria — hroty a hrotičky — vedci usúdili, že rachis bol pravdepodobne neskorší evolučný vývoj, ako sú tieto iné znaky.

sentence: The feathers' structure suggests that they were not used in flight but rather for temperature regulation or display. The researchers suggested that, even though this is the tail of a young dinosaur, the sample shows adult plumage and not a chick's down.
sentence_translated: Štruktúra pierok naznačuje, že neboli použité na lietanie, ale skôr na reguláciu teploty alebo na predvádzanie. Výskumníci naznačili, že aj keď ide o chvost mladého dinosaura, vzorka ukazuje dospelú srsť a nie perie mláďaťa.

sentence: The researchers suggested that, even though this is the tail of a young dinosaur, the sample shows adult plumage and not a chick's down.
sentence_translated: Výskumníci naznačili, že aj keď ide o chvost mladého dinosaura, vzorka vykazuje dospelé sfarbenie a nie perie mláďaťa.

sentence: A car bomb detonated at police headquarters in Gaziantep, Turkey yesterday morning killed two police officers and injured more than twenty other people.

sentence: They found the Sun operated on the same basic principles as other stars: The activity of all stars in the system was found to be driven by their luminosity, their rotation, and nothing else.
sentence_translated: Zistili, že Slnko funguje na rovnakých základných princípoch ako ostatné hviezdy: Aktivita všetkých hviezd v systéme bola poháňaná ich jasom, rotáciou a ničím iným.

sentence: The luminosity and rotation are used together to determine a star's Rossby number, which is related to plasma flow.
sentence_translated: Jasnosť a rotácia sa používajú spoločne na určenie Rossbyho čísla hviezdy, ktoré súvisí s prúdením plazmy.

sentence: The smaller the Rossby number, the less active the star with respect to magnetic reversals.
sentence_translated: Čím menšie je Rossbyho číslo, tým menej aktívna je hviezda, čo sa týka magnetických prevratov.

sentence: Duvall, who is married with two adult children, did not leave a big impression on Miller, to whom the story was related.

sentence: "We will endeavour to cut carbon dioxide emissions per unit of GDP by a notable margin by 2020 from the 2005 level," Hu said.

sentence: The Iraq Study Group presented its report at 12.00 GMT today.

sentence: It warns No one can guarantee that any course of action in Iraq at this point will stop sectarian warfare, growing violence, or a slide toward chaos.

sentence: In France, voting has traditionally been a low-tech experience: voters isolate themselves in a booth, put a pre-printed sheet of paper indicating their candidate of choice into an envelope.

sentence: South Africa have defeated the All Blacks (New Zealand) in a rugby union Tri Nations match at the Royal Bafokeng Stadium in Rustenburg, South Africa.

sentence: It was the final match for the All Blacks, who had already won the trophy two weeks ago.

sentence: The final match of the series will take place at Ellis Park in Johannesburg next week, when the Springboks play Australia.

sentence: A moderate earthquake shook western Montana at 10:08 p.m. on Monday.

sentence: The earthquake was centered about 20 km (15 miles) north-northeast of Dillon, and about 65 km (40 miles) south of Butte.

sentence: The strain of bird flu lethal to humans, H5N1, has been confirmed to have infected a dead wild duck, found on Monday, in marshland near Lyon in the east of France.

sentence: Chambers had sued God for "widespread death, destruction and terrorization of millions upon millions of the Earth's inhabitants."

sentence: UN peacekeepers, whom arrived in Haiti after the 2010 earthquake, are being blamed for the spread of the disease which started near the troop's encampment.

sentence: The Director of Public Prosecutions, Kier Starmer QC, gave a statement this morning announcing the prosecution of both Huhne and Pryce.

sentence: The fatalities were Nicholas Alden, 25, and Zachary Cuddeback, 21. Cuddeback had been the driver.

sentence: Edgar Veguilla received arm and jaw wounds while Kristoffer Schneider was left requiring reconstructive surgery for his face.

sentence: Beyond Wednesday's event, Carpanedo competed in two individual races at the Championships.

sentence: Her first was the Slalom, where she earned a Did Not Finish in her first run. 36 of the 116 competitors had the same result in that race.

sentence: Her other race, the Giant Slalom, saw her finish in tenth in the women's sitting group with a combined run time of 4:41.30, 2:11.60 minutes slower than first place finisher Austrian Claudia Loesch and 1:09.02 minutes slower than the ninth place finisher Gyöngyi Dani of Hungary.
sentence_translated: Jej ďalšia disciplína, obrovský slalom, ju umiestnila na desiate miesto v ženskej skupine sediacich pretekárok s celkovým časom 4:41,30, čo je o 2:11,60 minút pomalšie ako víťazka, Rakúšanka Claudia Loesch, a o 1:09,02 minút pomalšie ako pretekárka na deviatom mieste, Gyöngyi Dani z Maďarska.

sentence: Four skiers in the women's sitting group failed to finish their runs, and 45 of the 117 total skiers in the Giant Slalom failed to rank in the race.

sentence: The Madhya Pradesh Police recovered the stolen laptop and mobile phone.
sentence_translated: Polícia v Madhya Pradeši získala ukradnutý laptop a mobilný telefón.

sentence: The accused are named as Baba Kanjar, Bhutha Kanjar, Rampro Kanjar, Gaza Kanjar and Vishnu Kanjar.
sentence_translated: Obžalovaní sú menovaní ako Baba Kanjar, Bhutha Kanjar, Rampro Kanjar, Gaza Kanjar a Vishnu Kanjar.

sentence: Police superintendent Chandra Shekhar Solanki said the accused appeared in court with covered faces.

sentence: Although three people were inside the house when the car impacted it, none of them were hurt.

sentence: The road where the crash happened was temporarily closed while emergency services freed the driver from the red Audi TT.

sentence: He was initially hospitalised in the James Paget Hospital in Great Yarmouth.

sentence: He was subsequently relocated to Addenbrooke's Hospital in Cambridge.

sentence: Adekoya has since been in Edinburgh Sheriff Court charged with murdering her son.
sentence_translated: Adekoya bola odvtedy obvinená na súde šerifa v Edinburgu z vraždy svojho syna.

sentence: She is in custody pending indictment and trial, but any eyewitness evidence may be tainted because her image has been widely published.
sentence_translated: Je vo väzbe v očakávaní obžaloby a súdneho konania, ale akékoľvek svedecké dôkazy môžu byť ovplyvnené, pretože jej obraz bol široko publikovaný.

sentence: This is common practice elsewhere in the UK but Scottish justice works differently and courts have viewed publication of photos as potentially prejudicial.
sentence_translated: Toto je bežná prax inde vo Veľkej Británii, ale škótska justícia funguje inak a súdy považovali zverejnenie fotografií za potenciálne prejudiciálne.

sentence: Professor Pamela Ferguson of the University of Dundee notes "journalists do seem to be walking a dangerous line if publishing photos etc of suspects."
sentence_translated: Profesorka Pamela Ferguson z Univerzity v Dundee poznamenáva: "novinári sa zdajú kráčať po nebezpečnej hranici, ak zverejňujú fotografie a podobne podozrivých."

sentence: Crown Office, which is in overall charge of prosecutions, has indicated to journalists that no further comment will be made at least until indictment.
sentence_translated: Kancelária kráľa, ktorá má celkovú zodpovednosť za stíhanie, naznačila novinárom, že pred obžalobou nebude poskytnutý žiadny ďalší komentár.

sentence: The document, according to the leak, will refer to the borders dispute, which Palestine wants based on the borders before the 1967 Mideast War.

sentence: Israel demands an ongoing military presence in the valley for ten years once an agreement is signed while the PA agrees to leave such presence only for five years.
sentence_translated: Izrael požaduje vojenskú prítomnosť v údolí na desať rokov po podpise dohody, zatiaľ čo Palestínska samospráva súhlasí, že takúto prítomnosť ponechá iba na päť rokov.

sentence: Shooters in the supplementary pest control trial were to be closely supervised by rangers, as the trial was monitored and its effectiveness evaluated.

sentence: In a partnership of NPWS and the Sporting Shooters Association of Australia (NSW) Inc, qualified volunteers were recruited, under the Sporting Shooters Association's hunting program.
sentence_translated: V partnerstve NPWS a Asociácie športových strelcov Austrálie (NSW) Inc. boli kvalifikovaní dobrovoľníci prijatí v rámci programu lovu Asociácie športových strelcov.

sentence: According to Mick O'Flynn, the Acting Director Park Conservation and Heritage with the NPWS, the four shooters selected for the first shooting operation received comprehensive safety and training instruction.
sentence_translated: Podľa Micka O'Flynna, dočasného riaditeľa ochrany parkov a kultúrneho dedičstva v NPWS, štyria strelci vybraní na prvú streleckú operáciu dostali komplexné pokyny o bezpečnosti a výcviku.

sentence: Martelly swore in a new Provisional Electoral Council (CEP) of nine members yesterday.
sentence_translated: Martelly včera zložil prísahu novému dočasnému volebnému výboru (CEP) z deviatich členov.

sentence: Last month a presidential commission recommended the prior CEP's resignation as part of a package of measures to move the country towards new elections.
sentence_translated: Minulý mesiac prezidentská komisia odporučila rezignáciu predchádzajúceho CEP (ak je to potrebné, objasniť, čo znamená) ako súčasť balíka opatrení na posun krajiny smerom k novým voľbám.

sentence: The commission was Martelly's response to widespread anti-regime protests that started in October.
sentence_translated: Komisia bola Martellyho odpoveďou na rozsiahle protirežimné protesty, ktoré sa začali v októbri.

sentence: Around 60 cases of malfunctioning iPods overheating have been reported, causing a total of six fires and leaving four people with minor burns.
sentence_translated: Bolo hlásených približne 60 prípadov prehriatia iPodov, čo spôsobilo celkovo šesť požiarov a štyrom ľuďom spôsobili menšie popáleniny.

sentence: Japan's Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry (METI) said that it had been aware of 27 accidents related to the devices.
sentence_translated: Japonské ministerstvo hospodárstva, obchodu a priemyslu (METI) uviedlo, že bolo informované o 27 nehodách súvisiacich s týmito zariadeniami.

sentence: Last week, METI announced that Apple had informed it of 34 additional overheating incidents, which the company called "non-serious."
sentence_translated: Minulý týždeň METI oznámilo, že Apple ho informovalo o 34 ďalších incidentoch prehriatia, ktoré spoločnosť označila za "nevážne."

sentence: The ministry responded by calling Apple's postponement of the report "truly regrettable."
sentence_translated: Ministerstvo zareagovalo tým, že označilo odloženie správy od Apple za "naozaj ľutujem."

sentence: The eathquake struck Mariana at 07:19 a.m. local time (09:19 p.m. GMT Friday).

sentence: The Northern Marianas emergency management office said that there were no damages reported in the nation.

sentence: A former Filipino policeman has kept Hong Kong tourists hostage by hijacking their bus in Manila, the capital of the Philippines.
sentence_translated: Bývalý filipínsky policajt zadržiaval turistov z Hongkongu ako rukojemníkov, keď uniesol autobus, v ktorom boli, v Manile, hlavnom meste Filipín.

sentence: The photographers later took the place of an aged lady as she needed the lavatory. Mendoza was gunned down.

sentence: Liggins followed in his father’s footsteps and entered a career in medicine.

sentence: Out of 1,400 people polled prior to the 2010 federal election, those who oppose Australia becoming a republic grew by 8 per cent since 2008.

sentence_translated: Poverená premiérka Julia Gillard tvrdila počas kampane vo federálnych voľbách v roku 2010, že verí, že Austrália by sa mala stať republikou na konci panovania kráľovnej Alžbety II.

sentence: 34 per cent of those in the poll share this view, wanting Queen Elizabeth II to be Australia's last monarch.
sentence_translated: 34 percent respondentov v prieskume zdieľa tento názor, že kráľovná Alžbeta II. by mala byť poslednou monarchičkou Austrálie.

sentence: At the extremes of the poll, 29 per cent of those surveyed believe Australia should become a republic as soon as possible, while 31 per cent believe Australia should never become a republic.
sentence_translated: Na okrajoch prieskumu 29 % respondentov verí, že Austrália by sa mala stať republikou čo najskôr, zatiaľ čo 31 % verí, že Austrália by sa nikdy nemala stať republikou.

sentence: The Olympic gold medalist was due to swim in the 100m and 200m freestyle and in three relays at the Commonwealth Games, but due to his complaints his fitness has been in doubt.

sentence: He has been unable to take the drugs needed to overcome his pain as they are banned from the Games.

sentence: Comets may possibly have been a source of water delivery to the earth along with organic matter that can form proteins and support life.

sentence_translated: NextGen je systém, ktorý FAA tvrdí, že by umožnil lietadlám lietať kratšími trasami, ušetriť milióny galónov paliva ročne a znížiť emisie oxidu uhličitého.

sentence: It uses satellite-based technology as opposed to older ground-radar-based technology to allow air traffic controllers to pinpoint aircraft with greater precision and give pilots more accurate information.
sentence_translated: Používa technológiu založenú na satelitoch, na rozdiel od staršej technológie založenej na pozemnom radare, aby dispečerom leteckej dopravy umožnila presnejšie lokalizovať lietadlá a poskytovať pilotom presnejšie informácie.

sentence: No extra transport is being put on and overground trains will not stop at Wembley, and car parking and park-and-ride facilities are unavailable at the ground.

sentence: Fears of lack of transportation raised the possibility that the game would be forced to play behind closed doors without the team's supporters.
sentence_translated: Obavy z nedostatku dopravy vyvolali možnosť, že sa zápas bude musieť hrať za zatvorenými dverami bez fanúšikov tímu.

sentence: A study published on Thursday in the journal Science reported on formation of a new bird species on the Ecuadorean Galápagos Islands.
sentence_translated: Štúdia publikovaná vo štvrtok v časopise Science informovala o vytvorení nového druhu vtáka na Ekvádorských Galapágoch.

sentence: Researchers from Princeton University in the United States and Uppsala University in Sweden reported the new species evolved in just two generations, though this process had been believed to take much longer, due to breeding between an endemic Darwin finch, Geospiza fortes, and the immigrant cactus finch, Geospiza conirostris.
sentence_translated: Vedci z Princetonskej univerzity v Spojených štátoch a Uppsalskej univerzity vo Švédsku oznámili, že nový druh sa vyvinul len za dve generácie, hoci sa predpokladalo, že tento proces bude trvať oveľa dlhšie, v dôsledku kríženia medzi endemickým Darwinovým Vrabcom, Geospiza fortes, a prisťahovalým kaktusovým vrabcom, Geospiza conirostris.

sentence: Gold may be worked into all sorts of shapes. It can be rolled into tiny shapes.
sentence_translated: Zlato môže byť spracované do všetkých druhov tvarov. Môže byť valcované do malých tvarov.

sentence: It can be made very thin, and stuck onto other metal. It can be made so thin that it was sometimes used to decorate the hand-painted pictures in books called "illuminated manuscripts".

sentence: This is called a chemical's pH. You can make an indicator using red cabbage juice.
sentence_translated: Toto sa nazýva pH chemikálie. Môžete si vyrobiť indikátor pomocou šťavy z červenej kapusty.

sentence: The cabbage juice changes color depending on how acidic or basic (alkaline) the chemical is.
sentence_translated: Šťava z kapusty mení farbu v závislosti od toho, ako kyslá alebo zásaditá (alkalická) je chemikália.

sentence: The pH level is indicated by the amount of Hydrogen (the H in pH) ions in the tested chemical.
sentence_translated: Hladina pH je indikovaná množstvom iónov vodíka (H v pH) v testovanej chemikálii.

sentence: Hydrogen ions are protons that had their electrons stripped off them (since Hydrogen atoms consist of one proton and one electron).
sentence_translated: Vodíkové ióny sú protóny, ktorým boli odobraté elektróny (pretože vodíkové atómy pozostávajú z jedného protónu a jedného elektrónu).

sentence: Swirl the two dry powders together and then, with clean wet hands, squeeze them into a ball.
sentence_translated: Zmiešajte oba suché prášky dohromady a potom, s čistými mokrými rukami, vytvarujte z nich guľu.

sentence: The moisture on your hands will react with the outer layers, which will feel funny and form a sort of shell.
sentence_translated: Vlhkosť na vašich rukách bude reagovať s vonkajšími vrstvami, čo sa bude cítiť zvláštne a vytvorí akýsi plášť.

sentence: The cities of Harappa and Mohenjo-daro had a flush toilet in almost every house, attached to a sophisticated sewage system.
sentence_translated: Mestá Harappa a Mohenjo-daro mali splachovací záchod takmer v každom dome, pripojený k sofistikovanému kanalizačnému systému.

sentence: Remains of sewage systems have been found in the houses of the Minoan cities of Crete and Santorini in Greece.
sentence_translated: Zvyšky kanalizačných systémov boli nájdené v domoch minojských miest na Kréte a Santorini v Grécku.

sentence: There were also toilets in ancient Egypt, Persia and China. In Roman civilization, toilets were sometimes part of public bath houses where men and women were together in mixed company.
sentence_translated: V starovekom Egypte, Perzii a Číne boli toalety. V rímskej civilizácii boli toalety niekedy súčasťou verejných kúpeľov, kde boli muži a ženy spolu v zmiešanej spoločnosti.

sentence: When you call someone who is thousands of miles away, you are using a satellite.
sentence_translated: Keď zavoláte niekomu, kto je tisíce kilometrov ďaleko, používate satelit.

sentence: The satellite in space gets the call and then reflects it back down, almost instantly.
sentence_translated: Satelit vo vesmíre prijme hovor a potom ho takmer okamžite odráža späť na Zem.

sentence: The satellite was sent into space by a rocket. Scientists use telescopes in space because the Earth’s atmosphere distorts some of our light and view.
sentence_translated: Satelit bol vypustený do vesmíru raketou. Vedci používajú teleskopy vo vesmíre, pretože atmosféra Zeme skresľuje niektoré naše svetlo a pohľad na vesmír.

sentence: It takes a giant rocket over a 100 feet high to put a satellite or telescope in space.
sentence_translated: Na umiestnenie satelitu alebo teleskopu do vesmíru je potrebná obrovská raketa vysoká viac ako 30 metrov.

sentence: The wheel has changed the world in incredible ways. The biggest thing that the wheel has done for us is given us much easier and faster transportation.
sentence_translated: Koleso zmenilo svet neuveriteľnými spôsobmi. Najväčšou vecou, ktorú pre nás koleso urobilo, je, že nám dalo oveľa jednoduchšiu a rýchlejšiu dopravu.

sentence: It has brought us the train, the car, and many other transportation devices.
sentence_translated: Prinieslo nám vlak, auto a mnoho ďalších dopravných prostriedkov.

sentence: Under them are more medium sized cats that eat medium sized prey ranging from rabbits to antelopes and deer.
sentence_translated: Pod nimi sú ďalšie stredne veľké mačky, ktoré jedia stredne veľkú korisť, od králikov po antilopy a jelene.

sentence: Finally, there are many small cats (including loose pet cats) that eat the far more numerous small prey like insects, rodents, lizards, and birds.
sentence_translated: Nakoniec existuje mnoho malých mačiek (vrátane voľne žijúcich mačiek), ktoré jedia oveľa početnejšie malé koristi, ako sú hmyz, hlodavce, jašterice a vtáky.

sentence: The secret to their success is the concept of the niche, a special job each cat holds that keeps it from competing with others.
sentence_translated: Tajomstvo ich úspechu spočíva v konceptu niky, špeciálnej úlohy, ktorú každá mačka zastáva, čo ju chráni pred konkurenciou s inými.

sentence: Lions are the most social cats, living in large groups called prides.
sentence_translated: Levy sú najspoločenskejšie mačky, žijúce vo veľkých skupinách nazývaných smečka.

sentence: Prides are made up of one to three related adult males, along with as many as thirty females and cubs.
sentence_translated: Stáda sa skladajú z jedného až troch príbuzných dospelých samcov, spolu s až tridsiatimi samicami a ich mláďatami.

sentence: The females are usually closely related to each other, being a large family of sisters and daughters.
sentence_translated: Samice sú zvyčajne úzko príbuzné, tvoriac veľkú rodinu sestier a dcér.

sentence: Lion prides act much like packs of wolves or dogs, animals surprisingly similar to lions (but not other big cats) in behavior, and also very deadly to their prey.
sentence_translated: Lví svorky sa správajú veľmi podobne ako vlčie alebo psie svorky, zvieratá prekvapivo podobné levom (ale nie iným veľkým mačkám) v správaní a sú tiež veľmi smrteľné pre svoju korisť.

sentence: A well rounded athlete, the tiger can climb (though not well), swim, leap great distances and pull with five times the force of a strong human.
sentence_translated: Dobre vyvážený atlét, tiger dokáže šplhať (aj keď nie veľmi dobre), plávať, skákať na veľké vzdialenosti a ťahať s piatimi násobkami sily silného človeka.

sentence: The tiger is in the same group (Genus Panthera) as lions, leopards, and jaguars. These four cats are the only ones who can roar.
sentence_translated: Tiger je v rovnakej skupine (rod Panthera) ako levy, leopardy a jaguáre. Tieto štyri mačky sú jediné, ktoré môžu revať.

sentence: The tiger's roar is not like the full-voiced roar of a lion, but more like a sentence of snarly, shouted words.
sentence_translated: Ryk tigra nie je ako plný ryk leva, ale skôr ako veta zlostných, kričaných slov.

sentence: Ocelots like to eat small animals. They will catch monkeys, snakes, rodents and birds if they can. Almost all of the animals that the ocelot hunts are far smaller than it is.
sentence_translated: Oceloty rád jedia malé zvieratá. Chytajú opice, hady, hlodavce a vtáky, ak môžu. Takmer všetky zvieratá, ktoré ocelot loví, sú oveľa menšie ako on.

sentence: Scientists think that ocelots follow and find animals to eat (prey) by smell, sniffing for where they've been on the ground.
sentence_translated: Vedci sa domnievajú, že oceloty sledujú a nachádzajú zvieratá, ktoré jedia (korisť), pomocou čuchu, čuchajúc, kde sa pohybovali na zemi.

sentence: They can see very well in the dark with night vision, and move very stealthily, too. Ocelots hunt their prey by blending in with their surroundings then pouncing on their prey.
sentence_translated: Dobre vidia v tme s nočným zrakom a tiež sa veľmi tichým pohybom pohybujú. Oceloty lovia svoju korisť tým, že sa zlievajú so svojím okolím a potom sa vrhnú na svoju korisť.

sentence: When a small group of living things (a small population) gets separated from the main population that they came from (like if they move over a mountain range or a river, or if they move to a new island so that they can't easily move back) they will often find themselves in a different environment than they were in before.
sentence_translated: Keď sa malá skupina živých organizmov (malá populácia) oddelí od hlavnej populácie, z ktorej pochádzajú (napríklad ak prejdú cez horský hrebeň alebo rieku, alebo ak sa presunú na nový ostrov, aby sa nemohli ľahko vrátiť), často sa ocitnú v inom prostredí, ako boli predtým.

sentence: This new environment has different resources and different competitors, so the new population will need different features or adaptations to be a strong competitor than what they had needed before.
sentence_translated: Toto nové prostredie má iné zdroje a iných konkurentov, takže nová populácia bude potrebovať iné vlastnosti alebo prispôsobenia, aby bola silnejším konkurentom, ako potrebovala predtým.

sentence: The original population hasn't changed at all, they still need the same adaptations as before.
sentence_translated: Pôvodná populácia sa vôbec nezmenila, stále potrebujú rovnaké prispôsobenia ako predtým.

sentence: Over time, as the new population begins to adapt to their new environment, they start to look less and less like the other population.
sentence_translated: Postupom času, keď sa nová populácia začne prispôsobovať svojmu novému prostrediu, začnú vyzerať čoraz menej ako ostatná populácia.

sentence: Eventually, after thousands or even millions of years, the two populations will look so different that they can't be called the same species.
sentence_translated: Nakoniec, po tisícoch alebo dokonca miliónoch rokov, budú obe populácie vyzerať tak odlišne, že ich nebude možné nazvať rovnakým druhom.

sentence: We call this process speciation, which just means the formation of new species. Speciation is an unavoidable consequence and a very important part of evolution.
sentence_translated: Tento proces nazývame speciácia, čo jednoducho znamená vznik nových druhov. Speciácia je nevyhnutný dôsledok a veľmi dôležitou súčasťou evolúcie.

sentence: Plants make oxygen which humans breathe, and they take in carbon-dioxide which humans exhale (that is, breathe out).
sentence_translated: Rastliny produkujú kyslík, ktorý dýchajú ľudia, a prijímajú oxid uhličitý, ktorý ľudia vydychujú (t.j. vydychujú).

sentence: Plants make their food from the sun by photosynthesis. They also provide shade.
sentence_translated: Rastliny vyrábajú svoju potravu zo slnka prostredníctvom fotosyntézy. Taktiež poskytujú tieň.

sentence: We make our houses from plants and make clothes from plants. Most foods that we eat are plants. Without plants, animals could not survive.
sentence_translated: Naše domy vyrábame z rastlín a takisto oblečenie z rastlín. Väčšina potravín, ktoré jeme, sú rastlinné produkty. Bez rastlín by zvieratá nemohli prežiť.

sentence: Mosasaurus was the apex predator of its time, so it feared nothing, except other mosasaurs.
sentence_translated: Mosasaurus bol vrcholovým predátorom svojej doby, takže sa ničoho nebál, okrem iných mosasaurov.

sentence: Its long jaws were studded with more than 70 razor-sharp teeth, along with an extra set in the roof of its mouth, meaning that there was no escape for anything that crossed its path.
sentence_translated: Jeho dlhé čeľuste boli posiate viac ako 70 britvoostrými zubami, spolu s ďalšou sadou zubov na strope jeho úst, čo znamenalo, že pre čokoľvek, čo mu stálo v ceste, nebolo úniku.

sentence: We don't know for sure, but it may have had a forked tongue. Its diet included turtles, large fish, other mosasaurs, and it may even have been a cannibal.
sentence_translated: Nevieme to s istotou, ale mohlo mať forkovitý jazyk. Jeho strava obsahovala korytnačky, veľké ryby, iné mosasaury a možno bol dokonca kanibalom.

sentence: It also attacked anything that entered the water; even a giant dinosaur such as T. rex would be no match for it.
sentence_translated: Útočilo to aj na všetko, čo vošlo do vody; dokonca aj obrovský dinosaurus ako T. rex by mu nemohol odolať.

sentence: While most of their food would be familiar to us, Romans did have their share of strange or unusual feast items, including wild boar, peacock, snails, and a type of rodent called a dormouse
sentence_translated: Zatiaľ čo väčšina ich jedál by nám bola známa, Rímania mali aj svoj podiel na podivných alebo nezvyčajných jedlách, vrátane diviaka, páva, slimákov a druhu hlodavca nazývaného spánkovec obyčajný.

sentence: Another difference was that while the poor people and the woman ate their food while sitting in chairs, the rich men liked to have banquets together where they would lounge on their sides while they ate their meals.
sentence_translated: Ďalším rozdielom bolo, že zatiaľ čo chudobní ľudia a ženy jedli svoje jedlo posediačky na stoličkách, bohatí muži radi usporadúvali hostiny, kde ležali na boku, kým jedli svoje jedlo.

sentence: Ancient Roman meals couldn't have included foods that came to Europe from America or from Asia in later centuries.
sentence_translated: Staroveké rímske jedlá nemohli obsahovať potraviny, ktoré sa do Európy dostali z Ameriky alebo z Ázie v neskorších storočiach.

sentence: For instance, they didn't have corn, nor tomatoes, nor potatoes, nor cocoa, and no ancient Roman ever tasted a turkey.
sentence_translated: Napríklad, nemali kukuricu, ani paradajky, ani zemiaky, ani kakao, a ani žiadny staroveký Riman nikdy neochutnal moriaka.

sentence: The Babylonians built each of their gods a primary temple that was considered the home of the god.
sentence_translated: Babylónčania postavili každému svojmu bohu hlavný chrám, ktorý bol považovaný za domov boha.

sentence: People would bring sacrifices to the gods and the priests would try to attend to the needs of the gods through ceremonies and festivals.
sentence_translated: Ľudia prinášali obete bohom a kňazi sa snažili uspokojiť potreby bohov prostredníctvom obradov a festivalov.

sentence: Each temple had an open temple courtyard and then an inner sanctuary that only the priests could enter.
sentence_translated: Každý chrám mal otvorený chrámový dvor a potom vnútornú svätyňu, do ktorej mohli vstúpiť iba kňazi.

sentence: Sometimes special pyramid shaped towers, called ziggurats, were built to be a part of the temples.
sentence_translated: Niekedy sa stavali špeciálne veže v tvare pyramídy, nazývané zigguraty, aby sa stali súčasťou chrámov.

sentence: The top of the tower was special sanctuary for the god.
sentence_translated: Vrchol veže bol špeciálnou svätyňou pre boha.

sentence: In the warm climate of the Middle East, the house was not so important.
sentence_translated: V teplom podnebí Blízkeho východu dom nebol taký dôležitý.

sentence: Most of the life of the Hebrew family happened in the open air.
sentence_translated: Väčšina života hebrejskej rodiny sa odohrávala na otvorenom vzduchu.

sentence: Women did the cooking in the yard; stores were just open counters looking into the street. Stone was used for building houses.
sentence_translated: Ženy varili na dvore; obchody boli len otvorené pulty, ktoré sa pozerali na ulicu. Na stavbu domov sa používal kameň.

sentence: There were no large forests in the land of Canaan, so wood was extremely expensive.
sentence_translated: V krajine Kanaán neboli žiadne veľké lesy, takže drevo bolo mimoriadne drahé.

sentence: Greenland was settled sparsely. In the Norse sagas they say that Erik the Red was exiled from Iceland for murder, and when travelling further west, found Greenland and named it Greenland.
sentence_translated: Grónsko bolo osídlené len zriedkavo. V nórskych ságach sa hovorí, že Erik Červený bol vyhnaný z Islandu za vraždu a keď cestoval ďalej na západ, našiel Grónsko a nazval ho Grónsko.

sentence: But regardless of his discovery, Eskimo tribes were already living there at the time.
sentence_translated: Ale bez ohľadu na jeho objav, Eskimácke kmene tam už v tom čase žili.

sentence: Though each country was 'Scandinavian', there were many differences between the people, kings, customs and history of Denmark, Sweden, Norway and Iceland.
sentence_translated: Hoci každá krajina bola 'skandinávskou', medzi ľuďmi, kráľmi, zvykmi a históriou Dánska, Švédska, Nórska a Islandu bolo mnoho rozdielov.

sentence: If you have watched the movie National Treasure, you may think a treasure map was written on the back of the Declaration of Independence.
sentence_translated: Ak ste videli film Národný poklad, možno si myslíte, že mapa pokladu bola napísaná na zadnej strane Deklarácie o nezávislosti.

sentence: However, that is not true. Although there is something written on the back of the document, it is not a treasure map.
sentence_translated: Avšak to nie je pravda. Hoci je na zadnej strane dokumentu napísané niečo, nie je to mapa pokladu.

sentence: Written on the back of the Declaration of Independence were the words "Original Declaration of Independence dated 4th July 1776". The text appears on the bottom of the document, upside down.
sentence_translated: Na zadnej strane Deklarácie nezávislosti boli napísané slová "Pôvodná Deklarácia nezávislosti datovaná 4. júla 1776". Text sa nachádza na spodnej časti dokumentu, dole nohami.

sentence: While no one knows for certain who wrote it, it is known that early in its life, the large parchment document (it measures 29¾ inches by 24½ inches) was rolled up for storage.
sentence_translated: Hoci nikto presne nevie, kto to napísal, je známe, že na začiatku jeho existencie bol veľký pergamenový dokument (meria 29¾ palcov na 24½ palca) zvinutý na uskladnenie.

sentence: So, it is likely that the notation was added simply as a label.
sentence_translated: Takže je pravdepodobné, že notácia bola pridaná jednoducho ako označenie.

sentence: The D-Day landings and the following battles had freed the north of France, but the south still wasn't free.
sentence_translated: Vylodenia v deň D a nasledujúce bitky oslobodili sever Francúzska, ale juh ešte neboli oslobodené.

sentence: It was ruled by the "Vichy" French. These were French people who had made peace with the Germans in 1940 and worked with the invaders instead of fighting them.
sentence_translated: Bolo to pod vedením "Vichy" Francúzov. Títo boli Francúzi, ktorí v roku 1940 uzavreli mier s Nemcami a spolupracovali s okupantmi namiesto toho, aby s nimi bojovali.

sentence: On 15 August 1940, the Allies invaded southern France, the invasion was called "Operation Dragoon".
sentence_translated: 15. augusta 1940 spojenci vtrhli na južné Francúzsko, invázia sa nazývala "Operácia Dragoon."

sentence: In just two weeks the Americans and Free French forces had liberated southern France and were turning towards Germany.
sentence_translated: Za pouhé dva týždne americké a slobodné francúzske sily oslobodili južné Francúzsko a obracali sa smerom k Nemecku.

sentence: A civilization is a singular culture shared by a significant large group of people who live and work co-operatively, a society.
sentence_translated: Civilizácia je jedinečná kultúra, ktorú zdieľa veľká skupina ľudí, ktorí žijú a pracujú spoločne.

sentence: The word civilization comes from the Latin civilis, meaning civil, related to the Latin civis, meaning citizen, and civitas, meaning city or city-state, and that also somehow defines the size of the society.
sentence_translated: Slovo civilizácia pochádza z latinského civilis, čo znamená občiansky, súvisiaci s latinským civis, čo znamená občan, a civitas, čo znamená mesto alebo mestský štát, a to týmto spôsobom definuje veľkosť spoločnosti.

sentence: City-states are the precursors of nations. A civilizational culture implies the passing on of knowledge across several generations, a lingering cultural footprint and fair dissemination.
sentence_translated: Mestské štáty sú predchodcami národov. Civilizačná kultúra predpokladá odovzdávanie poznania naprieč viacerými generáciami, pretrvávajúcu kultúrnu stopu a spravodlivé šírenie.

sentence: Minor cultures often vanish without leaving relevant historic evidence and fail to be recognized as proper civilizations.
sentence_translated: Menšie kultúry často zanikajú bez toho, aby zanechali relevantné historické dôkazy, a nebudú uznané ako skutočné civilizácie.

sentence: During the Revolutionary War, the thirteen states first formed a weak central government—with the Congress being its only component—under the Articles of Confederation.
sentence_translated: Počas revolučnej vojny si trinásť štátov najprv vytvorilo slabú centrálnu vládu – s Kongresom ako jej jedinou súčasťou – podľa Článkov konfederácie.

sentence: Congress lacked any power to impose taxes, and, because there was no national executive or judiciary, it relied on state authorities, who were often uncooperative, to enforce all its acts.
sentence_translated: Kongres nemal žiadnu moc na uvalenie daní a, pretože neexistoval národný výkonný orgán ani súdna moc, spoliehal sa na štátne orgány, ktoré boli často neochotné, aby vykonávali všetky jeho akty.

sentence: It also had no authority to override tax laws and tariffs between states.
sentence_translated: Nemalo tiež právomoc obísť daňové zákony a clá medzi štátmi.

sentence: The Articles required unanimous consent from all the states before they could be amended and states took the central government so lightly that their representatives were often absent.
sentence_translated: Články vyžadovali jednomyseľný súhlas všetkých štátov predtým, ako mohli byť zmenené, a štáty brali centrálnu vládu tak ľahko, že ich zástupcovia boli často neprítomní.

sentence: Italy's national football, along with German national football team is the second most successful team in the world and were the FIFA World Cup champions in 2006.
sentence_translated: Talianska národná futbalová reprezentácia, spolu s nemeckou národnou futbalovou reprezentáciou, je druhým najúspešnejším tímom na svete a v roku 2006 bola majsterkou sveta vo futbale.

sentence: Popular sports include football, basketball, volleyball, water-polo, fencing, rugby, cycling, ice hockey, roller hockey and F1 motor racing.
sentence_translated: Populárne športy zahŕňajú futbal, basketbal, volejbal, vodné pólo, šerm, ragby, cyklistiku, ľadový hokej, kolový hokej a F1 motorové preteky.

sentence: Winter sports are most popular in the Northern regions, with Italians competing in international games and Olympic events.
sentence_translated: Zimné športy sú najpopulárnejšie v severných regiónoch, pričom Taliani sa zúčastňujú na medzinárodných hrách a olympijských podujatiach.

sentence: Japans holds nearly 7,000 islands (the biggest being Honshu), making Japan the 7th largest island in the world!
sentence_translated: Japonsko má takmer 7 000 ostrovov (najväčší je Honšú), čo robí z Japonska siedmy najväčší ostrov v svete!

sentence: Due to the cluster/group of islands Japan has, Japan is often referred to, on a geographical stance, as an "archipelago"
sentence_translated: Vzhľadom na skupinu ostrovov, ktoré Japonsko má, sa Japonsko často geograficky označuje ako „archipelag“.

sentence: Taiwan beginning start way back in 15th century where European sailors passing by record the island’s name as Ilha Formosa, or beautiful island.
sentence_translated: Taiwan sa začína v 15. storočí, keď európski námorníci, ktorí prechádzali okolo, zaznamenali názov ostrova ako Ilha Formosa, alebo krásny ostrov.

sentence: In 1624,Dutch East India Company establishes a base in southwestern Taiwan, initiating a transformation in aboriginal grain production practices and employing Chinese laborers to work on its rice and sugar plantations.
sentence_translated: V roku 1624 založila Holandská východná indická spoločnosť základňu na juhozápade Taiwanu, čím iniciovala transformáciu v pôvodných praktikách výroby obilia a zamestnala čínskych pracovníkov na svojich plantážach ryže a cukru.

sentence: In 1683, Qing dynasty (1644-1912) forces take control of Taiwan’s western and northern coastal areas and declared Taiwan as a province of the Qing Empire in 1885.
sentence_translated: V roku 1683 sily dynastie Qing (1644-1912) prevzali kontrolu nad západnými a severnými pobrežnými oblasťami Taiwanu a v roku 1885 vyhlásili Taiwan za provinciu Qing ríše.

sentence: In 1895, after defeat in the First Sino-Japanese War (1894-1895), the Qing government signs the Treaty of Shimonoseki, by which it cedes sovereignty over Taiwan to Japan, which rules the island until 1945.
sentence_translated: V roku 1895, po porážke v prvej čínsko-japonskej vojne (1894-1895), Qingská vláda podpísala Šimonoseckú zmluvu, ktorou postúpila suverenitu nad Taiwanom Japonsku, ktoré vládlo nad ostrovom až do roku 1945.

sentence: Machu Picchu consist of three main structures, namely Intihuatana, the Temple of the Sun, and the Room of the Three Windows.
sentence_translated: Machu Picchu pozostáva z troch hlavných štruktúr: Intihuatana, Chrám Slnka a Miestnosť troch okien.

sentence: Most of the buildings on the edges of the complex have been rebuilt in order to give tourists a better idea of how they originally appeared.
sentence_translated: Väčšina budov na okrajoch komplexu bola prestavaná, aby turistom poskytla lepšiu predstavu o tom, ako pôvodne vyzerali.

sentence: By 1976, thirty percent of Machu Picchu had been restored and restoration continues till today.
sentence_translated: Do roku 1976 bolo obnovených tridsať percent Machu Picchu a obnova pokračuje až dodnes.

sentence: For example, the most common still image photography format in the world is 35mm, which was the dominant film size at the close of the analog film era.
sentence_translated: Napríklad, najbežnejší formát fotografie statických snímok vo svete je 35mm, ktorý bol dominantnou veľkosťou filmu na konci éry analógového filmu.

sentence: It is still produced today, but more importantly its aspect ratio has been inherited by digital camera image sensor formats.
sentence_translated: Dnes sa stále vyrába, ale čo je dôležitejšie, jeho pomer strán bol zdedený formátmi obrazových senzorov digitálnych fotoaparátov.

sentence: The 35mm format is actually, somewhat confusingly, 36mm in width by 24mm in height.
sentence_translated: Formát 35 mm je v skutočnosti, trochu mätúco, 36 mm široký a 24 mm vysoký.

sentence: The aspect ratio of this format (dividing by twelve to obtain the simplest whole-number ratio) is therefore said to be 3:2.
sentence_translated: Pomer strán tohto formátu (delením dvanástich, aby sa získal najjednoduchší pomer celých čísel) sa preto hovorí, že je 3:2.

sentence: Many common formats (APS family of formats, for example) are equal to or closely approximate this aspect ratio.
sentence_translated: Mnohé bežné formáty (napríklad rodina formátov APS) sú rovné alebo sa blížia k tomuto pomeru strán.

sentence: The much-abused and often-ridiculed rule of thirds is a simple guideline creating dynamism while keeping a measure of order in an image.
sentence_translated: Veľmi zneužívané a často zosmiešňované pravidlo tretín je jednoduchá smernica, ktorá vytvára dynamiku a zároveň udržiava poriadok v obraze.

sentence: It states that the most effective place for the main subject is at the intersection of lines dividing the image into thirds vertically and horizontally (see example).
sentence_translated: Uvádza, že najlepšie miesto pre hlavnú tému je na priesečníku čiar, ktoré rozdeľujú obraz na tretiny vertikálne a horizontálne (pozri príklad).

sentence: During this period of European history, the Catholic Church, which had become rich and powerful, came under scrutiny.
sentence_translated: Počas tohto obdobia európskych dejín sa katolícka cirkev, ktorá sa stala bohatou a mocnou, bola pod drobnohľadom.

sentence: For over a thousand years the Christian religion had bound European states together despite differences in language and customs. I
sentence_translated: Viac ako tisíc rokov spájalo kresťanstvo európske štáty navzdory rozdielom v jazyku a zvykoch.

sentence: Its all-pervading power affected everyone from king to commoner.
sentence_translated: Jeho všadeprítomná moc ovplyvnila každého, od kráľa po bežného človeka.

sentence: One of the main Christian tenets is that wealth should be used to alleviate suffering and poverty and that the monetary funds of the church are there specifically for that reason.
sentence_translated: Jedným z hlavných kresťanských princípov je, že bohatstvo by sa malo používať na zmiernenie utrpenia a chudoby a že finančné prostriedky cirkvi sú určené práve na tento účel.

sentence: The central authority of the church had been in Rome for over a thousand years and this concentration of power and money led many to question whether this tenet was being met.
sentence_translated: Centrálna autorita cirkvi bola v Ríme viac ako tisíc rokov a táto koncentrácia moci a peňazí viedla mnohých k otázke, či sa tento zásad dodržiava.

sentence: Soon after the outbreak of hostilities, Britain initiated a naval blockade of Germany.
sentence_translated: Čoskoro po vypuknutí nepriateľstiev Británia iniciovala námornú blokádu Nemecka.

sentence: The strategy proved effective, cutting off vital military and civilian supplies, although this blockade violated generally accepted international law codified by several international agreements of the past two centuries.
sentence_translated: Stratégia sa ukázala ako účinná, keď prerušila dodávky životne dôležitých vojenských a civilných zásob, hoci táto blokáda porušovala všeobecne akceptované medzinárodné právo zakotvené v niekoľkých medzinárodných dohodách z uplynulých dvoch storočí.

sentence: Britain mined international waters to prevent any ships from entering entire sections of ocean, causing danger to even neutral ships.
sentence_translated: Británia ťažila medzinárodné vody, aby zabránila akýmkoľvek lodiam, aby vstúpili do celých častí oceánu, čím spôsobila nebezpečenstvo aj pre neutrálné lode.

sentence: Since there was limited response to this tactic, Germany expected a similar response to its unrestricted submarine warfare.
sentence_translated: Keďže na túto taktiku bola nízka reakcia, Nemecko očakávalo podobnú reakciu na svoju neobmedzenú ponorkovú vojnu.

sentence: During the 1920s, the prevailing attitudes of most citizens and nations was that of pacifism and isolation.
sentence_translated: Počas 20. rokov 20. storočia prevládal medzi väčšinou občanov a národov postoj pacifizmu a izolácie.

sentence: After seeing the horrors and atrocities of war during World War I, nations desired to avoid such a situation again in the future.
sentence_translated: Po tom, čo videli hrôzy a zverstvá vojny počas prvej svetovej vojny, národy sa snažili vyhnúť takejto situácii v budúcnosti.

sentence: In 1884, Tesla moved to the United States of America to accept a job with the Edison Company in New York City.
sentence_translated: V roku 1884 sa Tesla presťahoval do Spojených štátov amerických, aby prijal prácu v spoločnosti Edison v New Yorku.

sentence: He arrived in the US with 4 cents to his name, a book of poetry, and a letter of recommendation from Charles Batchelor (his manager in his previous job) to Thomas Edison.
sentence_translated: Prišiel do USA s 4 centami na svojom účte, knihou poézie a odporúčacím listom od Charlesa Batchelora (jeho manažéra z predchádzajúcej práce) pre Thomasa Edisona.

sentence: Ancient China had a unique way of showing different time periods; each stage of China or each family that was in power was a distinctive dynasty.
sentence_translated: Staroveká Čína mala jedinečný spôsob, ako ukázať rôzne časové obdobia; každé obdobie Číny alebo každá rodina, ktorá bola pri moci, bola charakteristická dynastiou.

sentence: Also between each dynasty was an unstable age of divided provinces. The best-known of these periods was the Three Kingdoms epoch taking place for 60 years between the Han and the Jin Dynasty.
sentence_translated: Medzi jednotlivými dynastiami bola aj nestabilná éra rozdelených provincií. Najznámejším z týchto období bola epocha troch kráľovstiev, ktorá trvala 60 rokov medzi dynastiou Han a dynastiou Jin.

sentence: During these periods fierce warfare took place between many nobles fighting for the throne.
sentence_translated: Počas týchto období sa odohrávali tvrdé boje medzi mnohými šľachticmi, ktorí bojovali o trón.

sentence: The Three Kingdoms was one of the bloodiest eras in Ancient China’s history thousands of people died fighting to sit in the highest seat in the grand palace at Xi’an.
sentence_translated: Tri kráľovstvá boli jedným z najkrvavejších období v histórii starovekej Číny, tisíce ľudí zomreli v boji o najvyššie miesto vo veľkolepom paláci v Si-ane.

sentence: There are a lot of social and political effects such as the use of metric system, a shift from absolutism to republicanism, nationalism and the belief the country belongs to the people not to one sole ruler.
sentence_translated: Existuje mnoho sociálnych a politických dôsledkov, ako je používanie metrického systému, prechod od absolutizmu k republikanizmu, nacionalizmus a presvedčenie, že krajina patrí ľuďom, nie jednému vládarovi.

sentence: Also after the Revolution occupations were open to all male applicants allowing the most ambitious and successful to succeed.
sentence_translated: Aj po revolúcii boli zamestnania otvorené pre všetkých mužských uchádzačov, čo umožnilo najambicióznejším a najúspešnejším uspieť.

sentence: Same goes for the military because instead of army rankings being based on class they were now based on cailaber.
sentence_translated: To isté platí aj pre armádu, pretože namiesto toho, aby boli vojenské hodnosti založené na triede, boli teraz založené na kalibru.

sentence: The French Revolution also inspired many other repressed working class people of other country's to began their own revolutions.
sentence_translated: Francúzska revolúcia inšpirovala aj mnohých ďalších utlačovaných pracujúcich z iných krajín, aby začali svoje vlastné revolúcie.

sentence: Muhammad was deeply interested in matters beyond this mundane life. He used to frequent a cave that became known as “Hira‘” on the Mountain of “Noor” (light) for contemplation.
sentence_translated: Muhammad sa hlboko zaujímal o záležitosti presahujúce tento každodenný život. Často navštevoval jaskyňu, ktorá sa stala známou ako „Hira‘“ na hore „Noor“ (svetlo) na meditáciu.

sentence: he cave itself, which survived the times, gives a very vivid image of Muhammad’s spiritual inclinations.
sentence_translated: Jaskyňa samotná, ktorá prežila veky, poskytuje veľmi živý obraz Muhammadových duchovných sklonov.

sentence: Resting on the top of one of the mountains north of Mecca, the cave is completely isolated from the rest of the world.
sentence_translated: Ležiaca na vrchole jednej z hôr severne od Mekky, jaskyňa je úplne izolovaná od zvyšku sveta.

sentence: In fact, it is not easy to find at all even if one knew it existed. Once inside the cave, it is a total isolation.
sentence_translated: V skutočnosti nie je vôbec ľahké to nájsť, aj keď by niekto vedel, že to existuje. Keď sa raz ocitnete v jaskyni, je to úplná izolácia.

sentence: Nothing can be seen other than the clear, beautiful sky above and the many surrounding mountains. Very little of this world can be seen or heard from inside the cave.
sentence_translated: Nič nie je vidieť okrem jasnej, krásnej oblohy nad nami a mnohých okolitých hôr. Z vnútra jaskyne je možné vidieť alebo počuť veľmi málo z tohto sveta.

topic: seven wonders of the world/pyramid at giza
sentence: The Great Pyramid at Giza is the only one of the seven wonders that is still standing today.
sentence_translated: Veľká pyramída v Gíze je jediným zo siedmich divov, ktorý stojí dodnes.

topic: seven wonders of the world/pyramid at giza
sentence: Built by the Egyptians in the third century BCE, the Great Pyramid is one of many large pyramid structures built to honor dead Pharaoh.
sentence_translated: Veľká pyramída, postavená Egypťanmi v treťom storočí pred naším letopočtom, je jednou z mnohých veľkých pyramíd, ktoré boli postavené na počesť mŕtvych faraónov.

topic: seven wonders of the world/pyramid at giza
sentence: The Giza Plateau, or "Giza Necropolis" in the Egyptian Valley of the Dead contains several pyramids (of which the great pyramid is the largest), several small tombs, several temples, and the great Sphinx.
sentence_translated: Gízska plošina, alebo "Gízska nekropola" v egyptskom Údolí mŕtvych, obsahuje niekoľko pyramíd (z ktorých Veľká pyramída je najväčšia), niekoľko malých hrobiek, niekoľko chrámov a Veľkú sfingu.

topic: seven wonders of the world/pyramid at giza
sentence: The great pyramid was created to honor the Pharaoh Khufu, and many of the smaller pyramids, tombs, and temples were built to honor Khufu's wives and family members.
sentence_translated: Veľká pyramída bola postavená na počesť faraóna Chufu a mnohé z menších pyramíd, hrobiek a chrámov boli postavené na počesť jeho manželiek a rodinných príslušníkov.

sentence: The "up bow" mark looks like a V and the "down bow mark" like a staple or a square missing its bottom side.
sentence_translated: Značka "hore zakrivené" vyzerá ako V a značka "dole zakrivené" ako sponka alebo štvorec bez dolnej strany.

sentence: Up means you should start at the tip and push the bow, and down means you should start at the frog (which is where your hand is holding the bow) and pull the bow.
sentence_translated: Hore znamená, že by ste mali začať na špičke a tlačiť na luku, a dole znamená, že by ste mali začať na žabke (kde držíte luk) a ťahať luk.

sentence: An up-bow usually generates a softer sound, while a down-bow is stronger and more assertive.
sentence_translated: Zdvihnutý ťah zvyčajne vytvára jemnejší zvuk, zatiaľ čo zostupný ťah je silnejší a dôraznejší.

sentence: Feel free to pencil in your own marks, but remember the printed bowing marks are there for a musical reason, so they should usually be respected.
sentence_translated: Neváhajte si poznačiť svoje vlastné značky, ale pamätajte, že vytlačené značky na ohýbanie sú tam z hudobného dôvodu, takže by sa zvyčajne mali dodržiavať.

sentence: The terrified King Louis XVI, Queen Marie Antoinette their two young children (11 year old Marie Therese and four year old Louis-Charles) and the King's sister, Madam Elizabeth, on the 6th October 1789 were forced back to Paris from Versailles by a mob of market women.
sentence_translated: Vystrašený kráľ Ľudovít XVI., kráľovná Mária Antoinetta, ich dve malé deti (11-ročná Mária Terézia a 4-ročný Ľudovít Karol) a kráľova sestra, madam Élisabeth, boli 6. októbra 1789 donútení vrátiť sa z Versailles do Paríža davom žien z trhu.

sentence: In a carriage, they traveled back to Paris surrounded by a mob of people screaming and shouting threats against the King and Queen.
sentence_translated: V koči sa vrátili do Paríža obklopení davom ľudí, ktorí kričali a vyhrážali sa kráľovi a kráľovnej.

sentence: The mob of people forced the King And Queen to have their carriage windows wide open.
sentence_translated: Davy ľudí prinútili kráľa a kráľovnú mať okná ich koča široko otvorené.

sentence: At one point a member of the mob waved the head of a royal guard killed at Versailles in front of the terrified Queen.
sentence_translated: V jednom momente člen davu zamával hlavou kráľovského strážcu, ktorý bol zabitý vo Versailles, pred kráľovnou, ktorá bola vystrašená.

sentence: The war expenditures of U.S. imperialism in the conquest of the Philippines were paid for by the Filipino people themselves.
sentence_translated: Vojenské výdavky amerického imperializmu na dobytie Filipín zaplatili samotní filipínsky ľudia.

sentence: They were compelled to pay taxes to the U.S. colonial regime to defray a major part of the expenditures and the interest on bonds floated in the name of the Philippine government through the Wall Street banking houses.
sentence_translated: Boli nútení platiť dane americkému koloniálnemu systému, aby pokryli hlavnú časť výdavkov a úrokov z dlhopisov emitovaných v mene filipínskej vlády prostredníctvom bankových domov na Wall Street.

sentence: Of course, the superprofits derived from the protracted exploitation of the Filipino people would constitute the basic gains of U.S. imperialism.
sentence_translated: Samozrejme, superzisky získané z dlhodobého vykorisťovania filipínskeho ľudu by predstavovali základné zisky amerického imperializmu.

sentence: To understand the Templars one must understand the context that prompted the creation of the order.
sentence_translated: Aby sme pochopili templárov, musíme pochopiť kontext, ktorý viedol k vytvoreniu tohto rádu.

sentence: The age where the events took place is commonly referred as the High Middle Ages the period of European history in the 11th, 12th, and 13th centuries (AD 1000–1300).
sentence_translated: Obdobie, v ktorom sa udalosti odohrali, sa bežne označuje ako Vysoký stredovek, obdobie dejín Európy v 11., 12. a 13. storočí (n.l. 1000–1300).

sentence: The High Middle Ages were preceded by the Early Middle Ages and followed by the Late Middle Ages, which by convention ends around 1500.
sentence_translated: Vrcholný stredovek predchádzal ranému stredoveku a nasledoval neskorý stredovek, ktorý podľa konvencie končí okolo roku 1500.

sentence: Technological determinism is a term that encompasses a wide range of ideas in practice, from technology-push or the technological imperative to a strict sense that human destiny is driven by an underlying logic associated with scientific laws and their manifestation in technology.
sentence_translated: Technologický determinizmus je pojem, ktorý zahŕňa široké spektrum myšlienok v praxi, od technologického tlaku alebo technologického imperatívu po prísny zmysel toho, že ľudský osud je riadený logikou spojenou so vedeckými zákonmi a ich prejavom v technológii.

sentence: Most interpretations of technological determinism share two general ideas: that the development of technology itself follows a path largely beyond cultural or political influence, and that technology in turn has "effects" on societies that are inherent, rather than socially conditioned.
sentence_translated: Väčšina interpretácií technologického determinizmu zdieľa dve všeobecné myšlienky: že vývoj technológie sám o sebe nasleduje cestu, ktorá je do značnej miery mimo kultúrneho alebo politického vplyvu, a že technológia na druhej strane má "účinky" na spoločnosti, ktoré sú vnútorné, skôr než sociálne podmienené.

sentence: For example, one might say that the motor car necessarily leads to the development of roads.
sentence_translated: Napríklad by sa dalo povedať, že automobil nevyhnutne vedie k rozvoju ciest.

sentence: However, a nationwide road network is not economically viable for just a handful of cars, so new methods of production are developed to reduce the cost of car ownership.
sentence_translated: Avšak celoštátna cestná sieť nie je ekonomicky životaschopná iba pre niekoľko áut, preto sa vyvíjajú nové metódy výroby na zníženie nákladov na vlastníctvo automobilu.

sentence: Mass car ownership also leads to a higher incidence of accidents on the roads, which leads to the invention of new techniques in healthcare for repairing damaged bodies.
sentence_translated: Hromadné vlastníctvo áut vedie aj k vyššiemu výskytu nehôd na cestách, čo vedie k vynálezu nových metód v zdravotnej starostlivosti na opravu poškodených tiel.

sentence: Romanticism had a large element of cultural determinism, drawn from writers such as Goethe, Fichte, and Schlegel.
sentence_translated: Romantizmus mal veľký prvok kultúrneho determinizmu, inšpirovaný autormi ako Goethe, Fichte a Schlegel.

sentence: In the context of Romanticism, the geography molded individuals, and over time customs and culture related to that geography arose, and these, being in harmony with the place of the society, were better than arbitrarily imposed laws.
sentence_translated: V kontexte romantizmu geografia formovala jednotlivcov a v priebehu času sa vytvorili zvyky a kultúra súvisiace s touto geografiou, ktoré, keď boli v harmónii s miestom spoločnosti, boli lepšie ako zákony uvalené arbitrárne.

sentence: In the manner that Paris is known as the fashion capital of the contemporary world, Constantinople was regarded as the fashion capital of feudal Europe.
sentence_translated: Rovnako ako je Paríž známy ako módne hlavné mesto súčasného sveta, Konštantínopol bol považovaný za módne hlavné mesto feudálnej Európy.

sentence: Its renown for being an epicenter of luxury began in about 400 A.D. and lasted up until about 1100 A.D.
sentence_translated: Jeho renomé ako epicentrum luxusu sa začalo okolo roku 400 n.l. a trvalo až do približne 1100 n.l.

sentence: Its status declined during the twelfth century mainly due to the fact that Crusaders had returned bearing gifts such as silks and spices that were valued more than what Byzantine markets offered.
sentence_translated: Jeho status klesol počas dvanásteho storočia hlavne kvôli tomu, že križiaci sa vrátili s darmi, ako sú hodváb a korenie, ktoré mali väčšiu hodnotu ako to, čo ponúkali byzantské trhy.

sentence: It was at this time that the transfer of the title of Fashion Capital from Constantinople to Paris was made.
sentence_translated: V tejto dobe došlo k presunu titulu hlavného mesta módy z Konštantínopolu do Paríža.

sentence: Gothic style peaked in the period between the 10th - 11th centuries and the 14th century.
sentence_translated: Gotický štýl dosiahol svoj vrchol v období medzi 10. a 11. storočím a 14. storočím.

sentence: At the beginning dress was heavily influenced by the Byzantine culture in the east.
sentence_translated: Na začiatku bolo oblečenie silne ovplyvnené byzantskou kultúrou vo východnej časti.

sentence: However, due to the slow communication channels, styles in the west could lag behind by 25 to 30 year.
sentence_translated: Avšak, kvôli pomalým komunikačným kanálom, môže štýly na západe zaostávať o 25 až 30 rokov.

sentence: towards the end of the Middle Ages western Europe began to develop their own style. one of the biggest developments of the time as a result of the crusades people began to use buttons to fasten clothing.
sentence_translated: Na konci stredoveku začala západná Európa vyvíjať svoj vlastný štýl. Jedným z najväčších pokrokov tej doby, v dôsledku krížových výprav, bolo, že ľudia začali používať gombíky na zapínanie oblečenia.

sentence: Subsistence agriculture is agriculture carried out for the production of enough food to meet just the needs of the agriculturalist and his/her family.
sentence_translated: Subsistenčné poľnohospodárstvo je poľnohospodárstvo vykonávané na výrobu dostatočného množstva potravy na uspokojenie potrieb poľnohospodára a jeho rodiny.

sentence: Subsistence agriculture is a simple, often organic, system using saved seed native to the ecoregion combined with crop rotation or other relatively simple techniques to maximize yield.
sentence_translated: Obživné poľnohospodárstvo je jednoduchý, často organický systém, ktorý využíva uskladnené semeno pôvodné pre túto ekooblasť v kombinácii s rotáciou plodín alebo inými relatívne jednoduchými technikami na maximalizáciu výnosu.

sentence: Historically most farmers were engaged in subsistence agriculture and this is still the case in many developing nations.
sentence_translated: Historicky väčšina farmárov sa zaoberala subsistenčným poľnohospodárstvom a to je stále pravda v mnohých rozvojových krajinách.

sentence: Subcultures bring together like-minded individuals who feel neglected by societal standards and allow them to develop a sense of identity.
sentence_translated: Subkultúry spájajú podobne zmýšľajúcich jednotlivcov, ktorí sa cítia opomenutí spoločenskými normami, a umožňujú im rozvíjať pocit identity.

sentence: Subcultures can be distinctive because of the age, ethnicity, class, location, and/or gender of the members.
sentence_translated: Subkultúry môžu byť charakteristické vďaka veku, etnickej príslušnosti, triede, lokalite a/alebo pohlaviu členov.

sentence: The qualities that determine a subculture as distinct may be linguistic, aesthetic, religious, political, sexual, geographical, or a combination of factors.
sentence_translated: Vlastnosti, ktoré určujú subkultúru ako odlišnú, môžu byť jazykové, estetické, náboženské, politické, sexuálne, geografické alebo kombináciou faktorov.

sentence: Members of a subculture often signal their membership through a distinctive and symbolic use of style, which includes fashions, mannerisms, and argot.
sentence_translated: Členovia subkultúry často signalizujú svoje členstvo prostredníctvom charakteristického a symbolického používania štýlu, ktorý zahŕňa módu, spôsob vyjadrenia a žargon.

sentence: One of the most common methods used to illustrate the importance of socialization is to draw upon the few unfortunate cases of children who were, through neglect, misfortune, or wilful abuse, not socialized by adults while they were growing up.
sentence_translated: Jednou z najbežnejších metód, ktoré sa používajú na ilustráciu dôležitosti socializácie, je poukázať na niekoľko nešťastných prípadov detí, ktoré neboli socializované zo strany dospelých počas svojho rastu kvôli zanedbaniu, nešťastiu alebo úmyselnému zneužívaniu.

sentence: Such children are called "feral" or wild. Some feral children have been confined by people (usually their own parents); in some cases this child abandonment was due to the parents' rejection of a child's severe intellectual or physical impairment.
sentence_translated: Takéto deti sa nazývajú "divoké" alebo "ferálne". Niektoré ferálne deti boli zadržiavané ľuďmi (zvyčajne svojimi vlastnými rodičmi); v niektorých prípadoch bolo toto opustenie dieťaťa spôsobené odmietaním rodičov voči závažným intelektuálnym alebo fyzickým postihnutím dieťaťa.

sentence: Feral children may have experienced severe child abuse or trauma before being abandoned or running away.
sentence_translated: Divoké deti mohli zažiť vážne zneužívanie alebo traumu predtým, ako boli opustené alebo ušli.

sentence: Others are alleged to have been brought up by animals; some are said to have lived in the wild on their own.
sentence_translated: Iní sú údajne vychovávaní zvieratami; niektorí sa hovorí, že žili vo voľnej prírode sami.

sentence: When completely brought up by non-human animals, the feral child exhibits behaviors (within physical limits) almost entirely like those of the particular care-animal, such as its fear of or indifference to humans.
sentence_translated: Keď je úplne vychovaný neľudskými zvieratami, divoké dieťa vykazuje správanie (v rámci fyzických možností) takmer úplne podobné správaniu konkrétneho zvieraťa, ako napríklad jeho strach alebo ľahostajnosť voči ľuďom.

sentence: While project based learning should make learning easier and more interesting, scaffolding goes a step beyond.
sentence_translated: Zatiaľ čo učenie založené na projektoch by malo uľahčiť a spríjemniť učenie, podpora ide o krok ďalej.

sentence: Scaffolding is not a method of learning but rather an aid that provides support to individuals whom are undergoing a new learning experience such as using a new computer program or beginning a new project.
sentence_translated: Lešenie nie je metóda učenia, ale skôr pomôcka, ktorá poskytuje podporu jednotlivcom, ktoré prechádzajú novým vzdelávacím zážitkom, ako je používanie nového počítačového programu alebo začatie nového projektu.

sentence: Scaffolds can be both virtual and real, in other words, a teacher is a form of scaffold but so is the little paperclip man in Microsoft Office.
sentence_translated: Podpery môžu byť virtuálne aj skutočné, inými slovami, učiteľ je formou podpory, ale takisto aj malý papierový sponkovač v Microsoft Office.

sentence: Virtual Scaffolds are internalized in the software and are meant to question, prompt, and explain procedures that may have been to challenging for the student to handle alone.
sentence_translated: Virtuálne lešenia sú internalizované v softvéri a sú určené na to, aby spochybňovali, podnecovali a vysvetľovali postupy, ktoré mohli byť pre študenta príliš náročné na to, aby ich zvládol samostatne.

sentence: Children are placed in Foster Care for a wide variety of reasons that range from neglect, to abuse, and even to extortion.
sentence_translated: Deti sú umiestnené do náhradnej starostlivosti z rôznych dôvodov, od zanedbávania, cez zneužívanie, až po vydieranie.

sentence: No child should ever have to grow up in an environment that is not nurturing, caring, and educational, but they do.
sentence_translated: Žiadne dieťa by nikdy nemalo vyrastať v prostredí, ktoré nie je podporujúce, starostlivé a vzdelávacie, ale stáva sa to.

sentence: We perceive the Foster Care System to be a safety zone for these children.
sentence_translated: Vnímame systém náhradnej starostlivosti ako bezpečnú zónu pre tieto deti.

sentence: Our foster care system is supposed to provide safe homes, loving caregivers, stable education, and reliable health care.
sentence_translated: Náš systém náhradnej starostlivosti by mal poskytovať bezpečné domovy, milujúcich opatrovateľov, stabilné vzdelanie a spoľahlivú zdravotnú starostlivosť.

sentence: Foster care is supposed to provide all the necessities that were lacking in the home they were previously taken from.
sentence_translated: Pestúnska starostlivosť by mala poskytnúť všetky potreby, ktoré chýbali v domácnosti, z ktorej boli predtým odobraté deti.

sentence: The Internet combines elements of both mass and interpersonal communication.
sentence_translated: Internet kombinuje prvky masovej a interpersonálnej komunikácie.

sentence: The distinct characteristics of the Internet lead to additional dimensions in terms of the uses and gratifications approach.
sentence_translated: Výrazné charakteristiky internetu vedú k ďalším dimenziám z hľadiska prístupu k využitiu a uspokojeniu potrieb.

sentence: For example, “learning” and “socialization” are suggested as important motivations for Internet use (James et al., 1995).
sentence_translated: Napríklad, „učenie“ a „socializácia“ sú navrhnuté ako dôležité motivácie pre používanie internetu (James et al., 1995).

sentence: “Personal involvement” and “continuing relationships” were also identified as new motivation aspects by Eighmey and McCord (1998) when they investigated audience reactions to websites.
sentence_translated: "Osobná angažovanosť" a "pokračujúce vzťahy" boli tiež identifikované ako nové motivačné aspekty Eighmeyom a McCordom (1998) pri skúmaní reakcií publika na webové stránky.

sentence: The use of video recording has led to important discoveries in the interpretation of micro-expressions, facial movements which last a few milliseconds.
sentence_translated: Použitie videozáznamu viedlo k dôležitým objavom v interpretácii mikrovýrazov, tvárových pohybov, ktoré trvajú niekoľko milisekúnd.

sentence: In particular, it is claimed that one can detect whether a person is lying by interpreting micro-expressions correctly.
sentence_translated: Konkrétne sa tvrdí, že je možné zistiť, či osoba klame, správne interpretovaním mikrovýrazov.

sentence: Oliver Sacks, in his paper The President's Speech, indicated how people who are unable to understand speech because of brain damage are nevertheless able to assess sincerity accurately.
sentence_translated: Oliver Sacks vo svojej práci Prejav prezidenta uviedol, ako sú ľudia, ktorí nie sú schopní rozumieť reči kvôli poškodeniu mozgu, napriek tomu schopní presne posúdiť úprimnosť.

sentence: He even suggests that such abilities in interpreting human behavior may be shared by animals such as domestic dogs.
sentence_translated: Naznačuje dokonca, že takéto schopnosti v interpretácii ľudského správania môžu zdieľať aj zvieratá, ako sú domáce psy.

sentence: Twentieth century research has shown that there are two pools of genetic variation: hidden and expressed.
sentence_translated: Výskum z dvadsiateho storočia ukázal, že existujú dva pooly genetickej variácie: skrytá a vyjadrená.

sentence: Mutation adds new genetic variation, and selection removes it from the pool of expressed variation.
sentence_translated: Mutácia pridáva novú genetickú variáciu a výber ju odstraňuje z množiny vyjadrených variácií.

sentence: Segregation and recombination shuffle variation back and forth between the two pools with each generation.
sentence_translated: Segregácia a rekombinácia premiestňujú variáciu sem a tam medzi oboma skupinami s každou generáciou.

sentence: Out on the savanna, it is hard for a primate with a digestive system like that of humans to satisfy its amino-acid requirements from available plant resources.
